mapper.select: SELECT L.LECTURE_NO as "lectureNo", L.LECTURE_NAME as "lectureName", L.PROFESSOR_NAME as "professorName", U.UNI_NAME as "uniName" FROM LECTURE L JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON L.DEPT_NO = D.DEPT_NO JOIN UNIVERSITY U ON D.UNI_NO = U.UNI_NO WHERE U.UNI_NO = #{uniNo} AND (L.LECTURE_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR L.PROFESSOR_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')

SELECT L.LECTURE_NO AS lectureNo, L.LECTURE_NAME AS lectureName, L.PROFESSOR_NAME AS professorName, U.UNI_NAME AS uniName FROM LECTURE L JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON L.DEPT_NO = D.DEPT_NO JOIN UNIVERSITY U ON D.UNI_NO = U.UNI_NO WHERE L.LECTURE_NO = #{lectureNo}
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO LECTURE_ASSESSMENT A USING DUAL ON (A.MEM_NO = #{memNo} AND A.LECTURE_NO = #{lectureNo}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET HOMEWORK = #{homework}, GRADE = #{grade}, TOTAL_SCORE = #{totalScore} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( ASSE_NO, MEM_NO, LECTURE_NO, HOMEWORK, GRADE, TOTAL_SCORE ) VALUES ( SEQ_ASSE.NEXTVAL, #{memNo}, #{lectureNo}, #{homework}, #{grade}, #{totalScore} )
